case_title: BENNY CHUNG VS. EVAN SEAN NADEL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-28-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT NADEL, EVAN SEAN SERVED NOV-24-2014, MAIL AS TO PLAINTIFF CHUNG, BENNY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. "AT DEFENDANT'S REQUST, DEFENDANT'S CROSS--COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
